title: Golden Roasted Portuguese Pork Roast
description: A traditional Portuguese dish featuring roasted pork shoulder steaks, this recipe is a nostalgic and flavorful delight. The flambe technique adds a rich and caramelized crust to the pork.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the pork shoulder steaks with paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder steaks for 2 minutes on each side, then set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the port wine and chicken broth to the skillet, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the pork shoulder steaks to the skillet and bring the liquid to a simmer.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes, then flambe the pork with a kitchen torch or under the broiler for 2 minutes.
Let the pork rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
